summary: The diff implements all four requirements. REQ-1 is addressed by keeping portfolio_images on OrganizerProfile and EventPhoto records in a separate eventPhotos map in the backend, with no cross-contamination in queries. REQ-2 is addressed by GuestOrganizerBrowsing using EventPhotoLightbox (fetching event photos via useGetOrganizerEventPhotos) on 'View Work' click, with an empty-state message. REQ-3 is addressed by OrganizerDashboard having clearly labelled separate 'Portfolio Images' and 'Events Photos' sections using PortfolioUpload and EventPhotoUpload respectively. REQ-4 is addressed by OrganizerProfileView using PortfolioGallery which only renders portfolio_images with an empty state. All acceptance criteria appear satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added, defining OldPortfolioImage, OldOrganizerProfile, OldActor types and a no-op run() function for schema migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any migration module or schema migration tooling. No requirement mentions adding a migration file.
